_comment: Example of the persisted DoS netshield state written by dos_netshield.py. This file is DOCUMENTATION ONLY and is NOT loaded at runtime. The live file lives at /etc/aegis/dos_netshield_rules.json on the Pi and is created/updated only when the network tier is explicitly enabled (AEGIS_DOS_NETSHIELD=1 + X-AEGIS-Netshield: enable). The sysctl revert snapshot is stored separately at /etc/aegis/dos_netshield_sysctl_backup.json.
